'''ngazhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrestingly|wrestingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrestingly|wrestingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngazhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngazhate|ngazhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngazhatesher|ngazhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazhatesherĂ«m|ngazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazhatero|ngazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngazhateshĂ«|ngazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazhateshĂ«m|ngazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazhatero|gokingazhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingazhateshĂ«|gokingazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazhateshĂ«m|gokingazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongazhankerom|gongazhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongazhankeshĂ«|gongazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongazhankeshĂ«m|gongazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongazhankeya|gongazhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazhaterom|ngazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazhatemu|ngazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngazhateya|ngazhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazhaterom|gokingazhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazhatemu|gokingazhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingazhateya|gokingazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngazhazhate|ngazhazhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngazhazhatesher|ngazhazhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazhazhatesherĂ«m|ngazhazhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazhazhatero|ngazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngazhazhateshĂ«|ngazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazhazhateshĂ«m|ngazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazhazhatero|gokingazhazhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingazhazhateshĂ«|gokingazhazhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazhazhateshĂ«m|gokingazhazhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongazhazhankerom|gongazhazhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongazhazhankeshĂ«|gongazhazhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongazhazhankeshĂ«m|gongazhazhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongazhazhankeya|gongazhazhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngazhazhaterom|ngazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngazhazhatemu|ngazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngazhazhateya|ngazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingazhazhaterom|gokingazhazhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingazhazhatemu|gokingazhazhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingazhazhateya|gokingazhazhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠte|ngĂŠzhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠtesher|ngĂŠzhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠzhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠtero|ngĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzhĂŠtero|gokingĂŠzhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠzhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠzhĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠzhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠzhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠzhĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠzhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠterom|ngĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠtemu|ngĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠzhĂŠteya|ngĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzhĂŠterom|gokingĂŠzhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzhĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠzhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠzhĂŠteya|gokingĂŠzhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafzhafte|ngafzhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafzhaftesher|ngafzhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafzhaftesherĂ«m|ngafzhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafzhaftero|ngafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafzhafteshĂ«|ngafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafzhafteshĂ«m|ngafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafzhaftero|gokingafzhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafzhafteshĂ«|gokingafzhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafzhafteshĂ«m|gokingafzhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafzhafnkerom|gongafzhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafzhafnkeshĂ«|gongafzhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafzhafnkeshĂ«m|gongafzhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafzhafnkeya|gongafzhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafzhafterom|ngafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafzhaftemu|ngafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafzhafteya|ngafzhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafzhafterom|gokingafzhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafzhaftemu|gokingafzhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafzhafteya|gokingafzhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
